footer.tagline: Your destination for racing team profiles, breaking news, and multimedia content from the world of motorsport.

fantasy.pageSubtitle: Build your lineup, lock before qualifying, and track your score each round.

draft.reviewDescription: Current entry status and lock eligibility.
draft.driversDescription: Tap the card — top half = D1, bottom half = D2
draft.teamsDescription: Select the team structure for aggregate results.
draft.pitWallDescription: Freely choose the pit wall command from any grid team.

predictions.title: Predictions
predictions.description: Extra points for pole, winner, podium, fastest lap, pit stop, and flags.

result.title: Score Breakdown
result.description: Persisted round result and recorded score blocks.
result.emptyBlock: No items calculated in this block.
result.emptyResult: Score breakdown appears after lock & first calculation.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.description: Round and cumulative season ranking from persisted score tables.
leaderboard.emptyRanking: Not enough scores to build ranking yet.

empty.noPitWallLeads: No Pit Wall Leads available at the moment.

rules.pageSubtitle: Everything you need to dominate the Fantasy Pitwall.
rules.overviewText: Each round, you build a lineup of 2 drivers, 1 team and 1 Pit Wall Lead within a budget cap of 100 credits. Lock your picks 30 minutes before Practice 1 (FP1) begins, make your predictions, and earn points based on real race weekend results.
rules.step1Text: Pick 2 drivers, 1 constructor team, and 1 Pit Wall Lead. Stay within the 100-credit budget. Teams have a 3-round minimum hold.
rules.step2Text: Predict pole sitter, race winner, exact podium, fastest lap, fastest pit stop team, safety car count, and red flag occurrence.
rules.step3Text: Your lineup and predictions lock automatically 30 minutes before the start of Practice 1 (FP1). No changes after that.
rules.step4Text: Points are calculated from real session data — qualifying, sprint (when applicable), and the race. Scores update live and become official once race results are confirmed.
rules.scoringPhilosophy: Each block rewards a distinct dimension of performance. There is no overlap between blocks.
rules.driverSubtitle: Individual on-track performance — what the driver controls.
rules.driverQualiPosition: Qualifying position: P1 = 10 pts down to P9-10 = 1 pt
rules.driverSprintPosition: Sprint position: P1 = 8 pts down to P8 = 1 pt
rules.driverSprintOvertakes: Sprint overtakes (grid to finish): up to +/-4 pts
rules.driverRacePosition: Race position: P1 = 25 pts down to P10 = 1 pt
rules.driverRaceOvertakes: Race overtakes (grid to finish): up to +/-6 pts
rules.driverFastestLap: Fastest lap of the race: +5 pts
rules.teamSubtitle: Collective results and mechanical execution — both cars combined.
rules.teamSprintDnf: Sprint DNF: -3 pts / double DNF: -6 pts
rules.teamRaceDnf: Race DNF: -4 pts / double DNF: -8 pts
rules.engineerSubtitle: Strategic decisions — timing, reactions, race management.
rules.engineerRaceGain: Race strategy gain (grid to finish sum): up to +/-6 pts
rules.engineerPointsConversion: Points conversion: 2 cars in points = +4, 1 car + gain 3+ = +2
rules.engineerPositionLost: Strategy lost positions (both lost, no DNF): -3 pts
rules.engineerCleanRace: Clean race management (no penalties, both finish): +2 pts
rules.engineerScWindow: SC window gain (pitted near SC + gained positions): +4 pts
rules.predictionsSubtitle: Bonus points for correctly predicting race weekend outcomes.
rules.predPodiumPresent: Driver on podium but wrong position: +3 pts
rules.predFastestPit: Predicted fastest pit stop team: +4 pts
rules.predComboPoleWinFl: Combo: predicted pole + winner + fastest lap: +5 bonus
rules.budgetText: You have 100 credits per round. Asset prices change each round based on performance. Teams have a 3-round minimum hold — you cannot drop a team within 3 rounds of picking it.
rules.lockText: Lineups lock automatically 30 minutes before the start of Practice 1 (FP1). After lock, no changes are allowed. Make sure your lineup and predictions are complete before the countdown reaches zero.
rules.tip1: The Pit Wall Lead scores independently from your team pick — choose the best strategist regardless of constructor.
rules.tip2: Undercut/overcut bonuses reward strategic pit timing relative to rivals, not just fast stops.
rules.tip3: Prediction combos (pole+win+FL and exact podium) are high-risk, high-reward — go for them when you feel confident.
rules.tip4: DNF penalties hit both your driver and team scores — reliability matters when picking.

unused.title: Temporary Components

unused.rawDataDescription: Raw API data not yet exposed on the main pages: LapSeries · WeatherDataSeries · Segments · Speeds I1/I2/FL/ST · ChampionshipPrediction · ContentStreams · CarData.z
